channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Family seeks N45.1m for mother’s life-saving kidney transplant
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A Nigerian family is appealing for N45.1 million to fund a life-saving kidney transplant for 55-year-old Mrs. Opeoluwa Dorcas. Learn how you can help.
Read More: https://punchng.com/family-seeks-n45-1m-for-mothers-life-saving-kidney-transplant/

item.title: Court jails two Ansaru commanders for life over terrorism
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Two Ansaru commanders, Mahmud Usman and Abubakar Abba, have been sentenced to life imprisonment by the Federal High Court in Abuja for terrorism offences.
Read More: https://punchng.com/court-jails-two-ansaru-commanders-for-life-over-terrorism/

item.title: 2027 Ticket: Kwankwaso confirms written one-term pact with Obi
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Rabiu Kwankwaso confirms a written one-term pact with Peter Obi for the 2027 presidency, ensuring power returns to the North after four years.
Read More: https://punchng.com/2027-ticket-kwankwaso-confirms-written-one-term-pact-with-obi/

item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Social media activist Martins Otse, popularly known as VeryDarkMan (VDM), has opened up about his reported fallout with Nigerian music star Davido. In a viral video circulating online, VDM claimed their relationship deteriorated after he turned down an alleged N50 million offer to campaign for Osun

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria, CBN, has revealed that two foreign currency accounts opened in connection with the controversial Presidential Foreign Investment Promotion Council, PFIPC, have remained inactive since their creation, with no funds deposited and no transactions recorded. Representatives o

item.title: 2026 World Cup: Drake loses $1.5m to betting after Spain beat Argentina
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Canadian singer, rapper Drake, has again lost a $1.5 million FIFA World Cup bet after Spain defeated Argentina. DAILY POST reports that Argentina was defeated 1-0 by Spain in the 2026 World Cup final on Sunday. Drake had backed Argentina to beat Spain, placing a $1.5 million wager through betting pl

item.description: Argentina captain, Lionel Messi, has penned an emotional letter to their supporters, after they were beaten 1-0 by Spain in the 2026 World Cup final. Albiceleste, who came into the game as defending champions, failed to compete with Luis de la Fuente’s men. Messi barely had a sniff all match a

item.title: Visitor Left Stunned After Finding Lion Statue Instead Of Live Animal
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: A man’s visit to a zoo in Port Harcourt took an unexpected turn after he discovered what appeared to be a moulded lion statue inside one of the animal enclosures instead of a live lion. In a video circulating on social media, the visibly surprised visitor filmed the caged exhibit, expressing d

item.description: A power surge on Monday triggered a fire outbreak in a 14-room residential building in Ilorin, the Kwara State capital. item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Washington, DC is stepping up to borrow $1.2 billion this week at its annual municipal debt sale, tapping the market as its credit stabilizes.

item.description: The Association of Local Governments of Nigeria, ALGON, Osun State chapter, has suspended the activities of all transport unions in public motor parks across the state with immediate effect. The Osun ALGON said it based its action on the worsening insecurity, recurring violence and clashes linked to

item.description: Nigeria's headline inflation rate eased marginally in June 2026, but the national figure continued to mask significant disparities in the cost of living across the country, with 19 states and the Federal Capital Territory (FCT) recording annual inflation rates above 30%. item.title: Road Rage / Old Ways Lyrics by Ladipoe & Gonaboy
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Ladipoe and Gonaboy Lyrics Road Rage / Old Ways by Ladipoe and Gonaboy is an introspective hip-hop track that explores themes of anger, emotional conflict, and the struggle to resist falling back into destructive habits, the lyrics reflect on the pressures of navigating life, injustice, identity, an

item.title: “The right place for me” – Nigeria star joins Swedish club from Nottingham Forest
item.dc:creator: Soccernet NG
item.description: Swedish club BK Häcken have signed Nigerian striker Joy Omewa from English club Nottingham Forest, Soccernet.ng reports. ​Omewa joined Nottingham Forest from Danish club Fortuna Hjørring in January, contributing three goals in ten league appearances in the second half of the campaign to help them fi

item.title: Kano Court Jails Man Seven Years For Advertising Cannabis On Social Media — NDLEA
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Describing the judgment as a landmark decision, the NDLEA said it underscored the consequences of using public platforms to promote illicit drugs. The post Kano Court Jails Man Seven Years For Advertising Cannabis On Social Media — NDLEA appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Fake presidential council participated in 2026 budget process — Walson-Jack
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Head of the Civil Service of the Federation, Mrs. Didi Walson-Jack, on Monday confirmed that representatives of the Presidential Economic Advisory The post Fake presidential council participated in 2026 budget process — Walson-Jack appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Messi Breaks Silence After Argentina’s World Cup Final Defeat, Congratulates Spain
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Argentina captain Lionel Messi has broken his silence following his team’s defeat to Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final, admitting that the loss will take time to overcome but expressing pride in the team’s achievements. Messi’s message was shared by football transfer journalist Fabrizio Romano

item.title: Outrage As FG Allocates ₦8.05bn To Construct, Renovate Churches, Mosques In 2026 Budget
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: The Federal Government has come under fire following revelations that ₦8.05 billion was earmarked for the construction, renovation, and equipping of churches and mosques in the 2026 budget. The allocation, uncovered by public accountability organisation Tracka, shows that ₦1.91 billion was set aside

item.title: World Cup 2026: It’ll Take Time For This Wound To Heal —Messi Opens Up On Argentina’s Defeat To Spain
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Lionel Messi has reacted to Argentina’s defeat to Spain in the final of the FIFA World Cup 2026 on Sunday. A goal by Barcelona forward Ferran Torres in the 106th minute of extra-time earned Spain a deserved 1-0 win against Argentina. The Albiceleste were reduced to 10 men in the 93rd minute after En

item.title: Houthis announce maritime blockade on Saudi Arabia
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Yemen’s Iran-backed Houthi rebels have announced a maritime blockade on Saudi Arabia after the two sides traded fire

item.title: Argentina face FIFA disciplinary action after World Cup final chaos
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: FIFA has launched disciplinary proceedings against Argentina following the post-match brawl that overshadowed the end of the 2026 FIFA World Cup final, with several players and the Argentine Football Association facing possible sanctions. The post Argentina face FIFA disciplinary action after World

item.title: Kano Flags Off Second Round Of Maternal, Neonatal Tetanus Vaccination Campaign
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The government said it deployed 906 vaccination teams, comprising 272 fixed-post teams and 634 temporary fixed-post teams, to immunise women between the ages of 15 and 49 years. The post Kano Flags Off Second Round Of Maternal, Neonatal Tetanus Vaccination Campaign appeared first on Channels Televis

item.title: ICPC grills Gbajabiamila over PFIPC
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Falana, who is representing Adeyemi, questioned how the body found its way into the national budget even if the appointment letter was forged, and called for ICPC to investigate Adeyemi and Gbajabiamila The post ICPC grills Gbajabiamila over PFIPC appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: “Over 80,000 Volunteers Registered For Iru Ekun Security Network” – Sunday Igboho
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Yoruba nation activist and founder of the Iru Ekun Security Network, Chief Sunday Adeyemo, popularly known as Sunday Igboho, says more than 80,000 volunteers have registered to join the security outfit across the South-West. Igboho said the figure reflects the commitment of people in the region to s

item.title: ADC Demands Details Of Energy Security Expenditure
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has called on President Bola Tinubu and the management of the Nigeria National Petroleum Company Ltd (NNPCL), to publish the full details of the country’s security expenditure. The party, in a statement by the National Publicity Secretary, Mallam Bolaji Ab

item.title: I Might Have Found My New Favourite Android: Infinix Hot 70 Pro 5G Review
item.dc:creator: Technext
item.description: Every phone gets about ten minutes before you know how you feel about it. The Infinix Hot 70…
